name: pide-es
description: Compare Just Eat, Glovo, and Uber Eats across Spain and prepare the best delivery option safely.

interface.shortDescription: Compare Spain's three big delivery apps
interface.longDescription: Search enabled accounts on Just Eat, Glovo, and Uber Eats; compare exact prices, fees, memberships, ETA, ratings, quantity, and quality; then prepare the selected basket without ordering unexpectedly.
defaultPrompt: Find the cheapest delivered way to get at least 20 litres of still water across my enabled apps. Do not order.
Find the fastest healthy dinner under €20 across Just Eat, Glovo, and Uber Eats.
I only use Just Eat and Uber Eats, and I have Uber One. Save that preference.
Prepare the best option in my basket, but stop before ordering.
